Text.val: p-account id could be passed by the submitted search (GETPARAM). Or it
could be passed by the program CompletedProcessing.

SQL_STMT_U.val: SELECT CDS_Account.Acct_AccountNo, CDS_Account.Acct_AccountId, CDS_Account.Acct_AccountName, CDS_Account.Acct_ContactNo, CDS_Account.Acct_ContactFirstName, CDS_Account.Acct_ContactLastName, CDS_Account.Acct_ContactEmail, CDS_Account.Acct_DateEmailSent, CDS_Account.Acct_TimeEmailSent, CDS_Account.Acct_UrlIdentifier, CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_DateSubmission, CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_UrlLastAccessed, CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_HasDataChanges, CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_CompletedProecssing FROM CDS_Account, dbo.CDS_SubmissionLog WHERE CDS_Account.Acct_MbrshipYear = CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_Year AND CDS_Account.Acct_AccountNo = CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_AccountNo AND CDS_Account.Acct_UrlIdentifier = CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_UrlIdentifier AND CDS_Account.Acct_AccountNo=':1'
